title: cinnamomum nilagiricum
intro: Cinnamomum nilagiricum, also known as Indian cinnamon or Neelam, is a plant species belonging to the laurel family and is native to the Western Ghats of India. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cinnamomum nilagiricum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it beneficial for cardiovascular health and immune system function. Cinnamomum nilagiricum can be prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
